credential_access_sequence.reason: Multiple failed logins followed by success indicate brute-force or password guessing.
Successful authentication after repeated failures indicates valid-account use.

credentialed_process_execution.reason: A valid account was used in the sequence.
Suspicious process execution occurred after authentication.

network_reconnaissance_sequence.reason: Port scanning followed by allowed network connection indicates reconnaissance.

persistence_change_sequence.reason: Registry modification or password reset indicates persistence or account manipulation.
Credential or account changes occurred after authentication.

privilege_escalation_sequence.reason: Valid account use preceded the privilege change.
Privilege or account manipulation was observed.

transaction_abuse_sequence.reason: Abnormal transaction behavior aligns with data manipulation or fraud.

data_exfiltration_sequence.reason: File or data collection was observed.
Large data transfer followed collection behavior.
